revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]]8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] was afflicted by a [[:en:Drought|Drought damage]], and on June 26 a meeting of the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] was held at Seiryōden, where [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] was present, to discuss whether to perform a [[:en:Rainmaking (ritual)|rainmaking ritual]].<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark [[:en:Cumulonimbus cloud|black clouds]] suddenly gathered above [[:en:Mount Atago|Atago]], covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]] and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>
== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] was afflicted by a [[:en:Drought|Drought damage]], and on June 26 a meeting of the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] was held at Seiryōden, where [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] was present, to discuss whether to perform a [[:en:Rainmaking (ritual)|rainmaking ritual]].<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark [[:en:Cumulonimbus cloud|black clouds]] suddenly gathered above [[:en:Mount Atago|Atago]], covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]] and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]]8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] was afflicted by a [[:en:Drought|Drought damage]], and on June 26 a meeting of the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] was held at Seiryōden, where [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] was present, to discuss whether to perform a [[:en:Rainmaking (ritual)|rainmaking ritual]].<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark [[:en:Cumulonimbus cloud|black clouds]] suddenly gathered above [[:en:Mount Atago|Atago]], covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]] and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]]8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] was afflicted by a [[:en:Drought|Drought damage]], and on June 26 a meeting of the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] was held at Seiryōden, where [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] was present, to discuss whether to perform a [[:en:Rainmaking (ritual)|rainmaking ritual]].<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark [[:en:Cumulonimbus cloud|black clouds]] suddenly gathered above [[:en:Mount Atago|Atago]], covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]] and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>
== Footnotes ==

== Overview == That year, the area around [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] was afflicted by a [[:en:Drought|Drought damage]], and on June 26 a meeting of the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] was held at Seiryōden, where [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] was present, to discuss whether to perform a [[:en:Rainmaking (ritual)|rainmaking ritual]].<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark [[:en:Cumulonimbus cloud|black clouds]] suddenly gathered above [[:en:Mount Atago|Atago]], covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]] and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]]8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.

At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{wikidata link|Q11561292}} [[Category:10th-century disasters]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Emperor Daigo]] [[Category:Incidents of the Heian period]] [[Category:Japan in 930]] [[Category:Kyoto in the Heian period]] [[Category:Lightning strike accidents]] [[Category:Sugawara no Michizane]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]]8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], in the 8th year of [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930 AD]] [[:en:July 24|July 24]]) at [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around [[:en:Heian-kyō|Heian-kyō]] was afflicted by a [[:en:Drought|Drought damage]], and on June 26 a meeting of the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] was held at Seiryōden, where [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] was present, to discuss whether to perform a [[:en:Rainmaking (ritual)|rainmaking ritual]].<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark [[:en:Cumulonimbus cloud|black clouds]] suddenly gathered above [[:en:Mount Atago|Atago]], covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, [[:en:Dainagon|Dainagon]] and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the [[:en:Fusō Ryakuki|Fusō Ryakki]], an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}}8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24}}) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}, in the 8th year of {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}} on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24}}) at {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} was afflicted by a {{ill|Drought|en|Drought|WD=Q43059|lt=Drought damage}}, and on June 26 a meeting of the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} was held at Seiryōden, where {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo}} was present, to discuss whether to perform a {{ill|Rainmaking (ritual)|en|Rainmaking (ritual)|WD=Q477738|lt=rainmaking ritual}}.<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark {{ill|Cumulonimbus cloud|en|Cumulonimbus cloud|WD=Q182311|lt=black clouds}} suddenly gathered above {{ill|Mount Atago|en|Mount Atago|WD=Q2975204|lt=Atago}}, covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, {{ill|Dainagon|en|Dainagon|WD=Q1354706|lt=Dainagon}} and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki}}, identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki}}, an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>
== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:清涼殿落雷事件]][[zh:清涼殿落雷事件]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11561292]] Wikidata name: Seiryōden lightning strike [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}}8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24}}) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}, in the 8th year of {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}} on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24}}) at {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} was afflicted by a {{ill|Drought|en|Drought|WD=Q43059|lt=Drought damage}}, and on June 26 a meeting of the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} was held at Seiryōden, where {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo}} was present, to discuss whether to perform a {{ill|Rainmaking (ritual)|en|Rainmaking (ritual)|WD=Q477738|lt=rainmaking ritual}}.<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark {{ill|Cumulonimbus cloud|en|Cumulonimbus cloud|WD=Q182311|lt=black clouds}} suddenly gathered above {{ill|Mount Atago|en|Mount Atago|WD=Q2975204|lt=Atago}}, covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, {{ill|Dainagon|en|Dainagon|WD=Q1354706|lt=Dainagon}} and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki}}, identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki}}, an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

{{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}}8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24}}) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}, in the 8th year of {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}} on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24}}) at {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō}} was afflicted by a {{ill|Drought|en|Drought|WD=Q43059|lt=Drought damage}}, and on June 26 a meeting of the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} was held at Seiryōden, where {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo}} was present, to discuss whether to perform a {{ill|Rainmaking (ritual)|en|Rainmaking (ritual)|WD=Q477738|lt=rainmaking ritual}}.<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark {{ill|Cumulonimbus cloud|en|Cumulonimbus cloud|WD=Q182311|lt=black clouds}} suddenly gathered above {{ill|Mount Atago|en|Mount Atago|WD=Q2975204|lt=Atago}}, covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, {{ill|Dainagon|en|Dainagon|WD=Q1354706|lt=Dainagon}} and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki}}, identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki}}, an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}, in the 8th year of {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD|1=930}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) at {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}} – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.

Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki|1=Fusō Ryakuki}}, an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>

{{Infobox event | title = | image = | caption = Depicted in the “Kitano Tenjin Engi Emaki”, the Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident | date = {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}}8th year {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD|1=930}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) | time = 16:00 - 16:30 | location = {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}} {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}} | reported deaths = 3–5 persons ({{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}}, {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}}, Minu Tadakazusa (美努忠包), {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} 2 persons?) | reported injuries = 2–4 persons (Kikinren, Azumi Sōjin, 2 persons of Konoe?) | reported property damage = South eave of Seiryōden burned }}
'''Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident''' (清涼殿落雷事件) is a lightning strike disaster that occurred during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}, in the 8th year of {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} on {{ill|June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (Lunisolar)|lt=June 26 (lunar calendar)|ja|6月26日 (旧暦)|lt=June 26|lt_ja=6月26日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 26 (lunar calendar)|qq=}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930 AD|1=930}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|WD=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) at {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}} – {{ill|Imperial Palace|ja|内裏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Palace|1=Dairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3012148}} – at {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11251344}}, where a lightning strike occurred.
== Overview == That year, the area around {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|WD=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}} was afflicted by a {{ill|Drought|en|Drought|WD=Q43059|lt=Drought damage|1=Drought}}, and on June 26 a meeting of the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} was held at Seiryōden, where {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}} was present, to discuss whether to perform a {{ill|Rainmaking (ritual)|en|Rainmaking (ritual)|WD=Q477738|lt=rainmaking ritual|1=Rainmaking (ritual)}}.<ref>『日本紀略』延長8th year 5月15日、6月</ref> However, shortly after noon, dark {{ill|Cumulonimbus cloud|en|Cumulonimbus cloud|WD=Q182311|lt=black clouds|1=Cumulonimbus cloud}} suddenly gathered above {{ill|Mount Atago|en|Mount Atago|WD=Q2975204|lt=Atago|1=Mount Atago}}, covering Heian-kyō and unleashing a violent {{ill|thunderstorm|ja|夕立|lt=Thunderstorm|lt_ja=雷雨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thunderstorm|1=Thunderstorm|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430266}}.<ref name="kiryaku">『日本紀略』延長8th year 6月26日</ref> Shortly after 16:00, lightning directly struck the first pillar on the southwest side of Seiryōden.<ref name="fusob">『扶桑略記』裏書 延長8th year 6月26日</ref><ref name="kiryaku" />
At that time, courtiers ({{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}}) and officials ({{ill|kanjin|ja|官人|1=kanjin|2=ja|3=官人|4=ko|5=관인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kanjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452075}}) present were caught up in the incident. Among the courtiers, {{ill|Dainagon|en|Dainagon|WD=Q1354706|lt=Dainagon|1=Dainagon}} and {{ill|Minister of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省（律令制）|lt=Minbu-kyo|lt_ja=民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Popular Affairs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|Fujiwara Kiyokan|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Kiyokan|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623386}} had his garments set on fire and his chest torn open, dying instantly, while {{ill|Right Middle-Border|ja|右中弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Middle-Border|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|1=benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} and {{ill|Internal Storage Head|ja|内蔵頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Internal Storage Head|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内蔵寮|1=kuraryou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11394423}} {{ill|Taira Kiyose|ja|平希世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Kiyose|1=Taira no Mareyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482760}} suffered facial burns and was left in critical condition. Shortly after 16:30, as the rain ceased, Kiyokan was secretly transported by carriage from {{ill|Yōmyōmon|ja|陽明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyōmon|1=Yōmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658781}}, and Kiyose from {{ill|Shūmyōmon|ja|修明門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūmyōmon|1=Shūmeimon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17993177}}; however, Kiyose soon died.
The lightning also struck the adjacent {{ill|Shishinden|ja|紫宸殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shishinden|1=Shishin Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605706}}, and {{ill|Uhyōesa|ja|右兵衛佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uhyōesa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵衛府|1=Hyōefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11393702}} Minu Tadakazusa (in the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki|1=Fusō Ryakuki}}, identified as {{ill|Ukonoe Tadakane|ja|右近衛忠兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Tadakane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in that account) had his hair burned and died. Kikinren suffered burns to his abdomen and writhed in agony, and Azumi Sōjin had his knees burned, rendering him unable to stand; although the two were between life and death, they eventually recovered. Additionally, a fire broke out at the south eave of Seiryōden, and {{ill|Ukonoe Shigehide|ja|右近衛茂景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukonoe Shigehide|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} single-handedly engaged in {{ill|firefighting|ja|消火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/firefighting|1=fire extinguishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559471}}.<ref name="kiryaku" /><ref name="fusob" /> According to the {{ill|Fusō Ryakuki|en|Fusō Ryakuki|WD=Q11076282|lt=Fusō Ryakki|1=Fusō Ryakuki}}, an additional two members of the {{ill|Imperial Guard Office|ja|近衛府|lt=Guard|lt_ja=近衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Guard Office|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11638974}} were struck by lightning at Seiryōden.<ref name="fusof">『扶桑略記』本文 延長8th year 6月26日</ref>
